parameters: <Minimap:person0>
"Welcome! This is a wonderful place where you can have fun
and move your body freely."
"A recommended place for those who enjoy moving and for those who have
been recently wanting to exercise due to lack of physical activity!"
"There are also clear rewards and such in the mini-games, so
please be sure to play them♪"
<Minimap:person0>
"Here, you can listen to explanations about the rewards for clearing
each course and how to operate, but would you like to hear them?"
Listen.

Listen.
選択肢ヘルプ
You can listen to clear rewards and operation explanations.
"Well then, let me begin by introducing the rewards."
"Beginner Course 1 medicine box, Intermediate Course 1
Muscle Drink, Advanced Course 1 Supplement (type random)"
"Expert Course 3 Chinese Herbal Medicine EX, Ultimate
Course 1 Ninja Boots"
"We have taken this approach. Next, let me explain the controls."
"The movement method is stationary, and you can perform a
jump action by pressing the 'C' key on the keyboard."
"However, please note that it will not activate unless you have set up
the jump configuration in the environment settings (by default, it is
set to the 'C' key on the keyboard)."
"If you change the button configuration, it will correspond to the
button that has been changed. You can examine the signboards at the
starting points of each course to access key configuration settings
and options such as retreat."
"Pressing the confirm key will activate the grappling hook
action. By extending the rope towards a distant tree branch,
you can perform movement according to this feature."
"Please utilize both the jumping action and the grappling
hook action to aim for the goal."
"That concludes the explanation."
I won't listen.
選択肢ヘルプ
I won't ask anything. It's a cancel.
"I see. If you ever want to know, feel free to ask."
